pipelines.name: qcam1
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location=rtsp://<machine2-tsn-vlan1-ip>:8554/hota-metrics-cam1 latency=200 ! rtph264depay ! h264parse ! gvapython class=SEIParser arg=["camera1"] function=process module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sei_parser.py name=sei_parser ! avdec_h264 ! videoconvert ! videoscale ! video/x-raw,format=BGR,width=800,height=600 ! gvapython class=PostDecodeTimestampCapture function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=timesync ! gvadetect threshold=0.4 model=/home/pipeline-server/models/intel/person-detection-retail-0013/FP32/person-detection-retail-0013.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/object_detection/person/person-detection-retail-0013.json ! gvametaconvert add-tensor-data=true name=metaconvert ! gvapython class=PostInferenceDataPublish function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=datapublisher ! gvametapublish name=destination ! appsink sync=true

metadatagenpolicy.description: Meta data generation policy, one of detectionPolicy(default),reidPolicy,classificationPolicy

detection_labels.description: List of detection labels to filter (e.g., ["person", "car"]). If empty, all labels are published.
